summary: Iteration 7: Phase 1 new features testing - 5-tab bottom navigation, Profile page, Sohba (community) page, and Messages page. All Phase 1 features are working correctly. Backend health and auth APIs verified. Frontend navigation, page content, and interactive elements all functioning as expected.

minor.issue: 403 error in console - non-blocking, external translation API issue

critical_code_review_comments: Bottom navigation has 5 tabs with proper data-testid attributes ✅
Home page (/) loads with hero image, prayer times, hadith ✅
Sohba page (/sohba) loads with header, scrollable tabs, posts feed ✅
Sohba posts have like/comment/share/bookmark buttons working ✅
Sohba tabs (من أجلك, متابعة, رمضان, مميز, تقوية الإيمان, الحج والعمرة, السفر الحلال) all present ✅
Trending button opens/closes trending hashtags panel ✅
Messages page (/messages) loads with 3 tabs (الإشعارات, الرسائل, النشاط) ✅
Messages page shows sample notification items ✅
Profile page (/profile) loads with stats (زوار, أصدقاء, متابعين, متابَعين) ✅
Profile page has membership card with 'انضم الآن' button ✅
Profile page has quick links (المحفوظات, المكافآت, المظهر, اللغة) ✅
Profile page shows login button for unauthenticated users ✅
Navigation between all 5 tabs works correctly ✅
Backend POST /api/auth/login works with admin credentials ✅
seed_data_creation: None needed - Sohba posts and Messages notifications use sample data in frontend state (MOCKED)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 new features all working. Bottom nav has 5 tabs. Sohba social features (posts, likes, comments) use local state - NO backend API for social features yet (MOCKED). Messages notifications are sample data in frontend (MOCKED). PermissionManager overlay appears on first load - dismiss with data-testid='permission-dismiss-btn'. Translation API shows 403 (external Google API issue, non-blocking).
mocked_apis_note: IMPORTANT: Sohba social features (posts/likes/comments/shares) and Messages notifications are MOCKED in frontend state - no backend API integration yet

sohba_page.post_actions: ✅ Like, comment, share, bookmark buttons work

backend_apis.auth_login: ✅ POST /api/auth/login with admin credentials returns token
